visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown, messy hair, wearing an oversized white short-sleeved t-shirt and light blue jeans, stands in a brightly lit modern living room. He looks directly into the camera with a grumpy and suspicious facial expression, shifting his gaze slightly as the camera maintains an eye-level medium shot. (2) The scene cuts to him sitting on a plush white sofa and then standing in a hallway; he holds up various items of clothing, including a pink hoodie and beige trousers with cartoon prints, looking frustrated. (3) He moves to a different indoor area, aggressively presenting a pink motorcycle helmet and a cardboard box to the camera. (4) The man stands in a bathroom with white wall tiles and a glass shower door; he holds two white boxes of hair care products, smiling broadly with an energetic expression while gesturing towards the items. (5) Close-up shots show the man applying a liquid product from a large blue bottle onto his scalp, massaging it with his hands to create white foam. He looks satisfied and happy. (6) Still in the bathroom, he holds up a large blue bottle of the product and points to it while talking; the lighting remains bright and clean. (7) A brief grayscale shot appears of a woman standing outdoors under a tree, looking distressed and touching her messy hair. (8) The video returns to the man in the living room, standing behind a table displaying a full range of hair products; he gives a thumbs up and points at the camera with a cheerful and persuasive expression.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the product, 1 female appearing briefly in a grayscale outdoor b-roll shot.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male with brown messy hair wearing a white oversized t-shirt and blue jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist and modern indoor home setting including a white sofa, clean white walls, and a bathroom with white tiling and standard bathroom fixtures.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks with high energy and an exaggerated comedic tone, lacking background music at first. His articulation is clear and assertive. (2) Upbeat acoustic guitar music with a steady rhythm (~124 BPM) fades in quickly. The male vocal shifts from a complaining tone to a more dramatic, shouting style as he transitions into the main content. (3) A sharp 'Whoosh' sound effect marks a visual transition. The male voice continues at a high arousal level, with frequent pitch modulations and high intensity. (4) The audio texture remains consistent with a clean vocal signal layered over the continuous acoustic BGM. Short 'Pop' and 'Ding' sound effects are synchronized with the appearance of text and graphics. (5) A distinct liquid splashing sound is heard as the product is demonstrated. The narrator's tone becomes more informative and persuasive while maintaining high energy. (6) The video concludes with a final enthusiastic statement from the male voice, followed by a lighthearted musical tag.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Problem -> Product Introduction -> Feature Demonstration -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the AROMASE scalp purifying liquid through a comedic skit where the creator jokingly complains about his work conditions before transitioning into a direct endorsement of the product's features, usage, and group-buy discount.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator directly presents the product, describes its ingredients (Vitamin B5, Blue Algae), demonstrates its usage in the shower, and provides specific group-buy dates and discount information.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses social-media-native editing with high text density and sound effects to maintain viewer engagement while delivering a commercial message.
